description: You are a Data Analyst for the City of New York. Using the 311 Service Request data located at '/home/ga/Documents/data/nyc_noise.csv', identify 'chronic noise offenders'—defined as addresses that have received 3 or more 'Noise - Residential' complaints within any 7-day rolling window. Import the data into a table named 'complaints' within a DBeaver SQLite connection named 'CityData'. Export the unique list of chronic offender addresses to '/home/ga/Documents/exports/chronic_addresses.csv' (using the column name 'Incident Address') and save the SQL analysis script to '/home/ga/Documents/scripts/noise_analysis.sql'. Note that the 'Created Date' column is in 'MM/DD/YYYY HH:MM:SS AM/PM' format.
